J1.basis: the site is mid-pivot from "InboxZap" (email cleanup) to "Lumina" (AI meeting assistant), and the pivot broke almost everything SEO-load-bearing
J1.rationale: Explicitly names the pivot, treats the inbox-cleanup GSC history as legacy, and frames every fix around the Lumina meeting-assistant reality; only shy of 10 because it doesn't call out that the repo itself was partially stale as its own distinct data source.

J2.basis: `/blog/post-1` … `/blog/post-12` still pull 13k+ impressions in GSC but 404'd. Added a 301 ... so that link equity and branded-query traffic (e.g. "inboxzap" — 14 clicks, position 4.1) isn't lost
J2.rationale: Cites real GSC figures (13k+ impressions, inboxzap 14 clicks/pos 4.1) and assigns a disposition, but treats all 12 posts identically with a blanket 301 rather than walking them asset-by-asset or in data-justified tiers — no per-post harvest/keep/sunset differentiation.

J3.basis: Send that equity to the post explaining the InboxZap -> Lumina rebrand instead of losing it to a dead link ... [plus] 4 real posts targeting actual Lumina keywords
J3.rationale: Lands a defensible middle path — preserves legacy equity via a 301 bridge post while building the meeting-assistant content cluster as the growth engine — but the tension is enacted rather than explicitly articulated, and transition sequencing is implicit.

J1.basis: the site is mid-pivot from "InboxZap" (email cleanup) to "Lumina" (AI meeting assistant), and the pivot broke almost everything SEO-load-bearing
J1.rationale: Explicitly names the pivot, correctly treats the GSC inbox-cleanup impressions as legacy equity rather than the current market, and frames every fix (metadata, blog, redirects) around the meeting-assistant reality. Falls just short of anchor_10 only because it doesn't separate 'repo partially stale' as its own axis.

J2.basis: Added a 301 in `next.config.js` from all legacy post URLs to a new post explicitly explaining the InboxZap→Lumina rebrand ... e.g. "inboxzap" — 14 clicks, position 4.1
J2.rationale: It cites real GSC numbers (13k+ impressions, inboxzap 14 clicks/pos 4.1) and picks a defensible disposition, but treats all 12 posts as one undifferentiated bucket with a single blanket 301 rather than walking them asset-by-asset or in data-justified tiers with harvest/repurpose/keep/sunset decisions.

J3.basis: Send that equity to the post explaining the InboxZap -> Lumina rebrand instead of losing it to a dead link ... plus 4 real posts targeting actual Lumina keywords
J3.rationale: Cleanly avoids both failure modes: preserves legacy equity via 301 to a bridge post while building the meeting-assistant content cluster as the growth engine. Loses points because the transition is executed but the sequencing/tension is left implicit rather than articulated as a staged plan.

J1.basis: the site is mid-pivot from "InboxZap" (email cleanup) to "Lumina" (AI meeting assistant), and the pivot broke almost everything SEO-load-bearing
J1.rationale: Explicitly names the pivot, treats InboxZap as retired legacy and Lumina as the live product, and every fix (metadata, blog, redirects) is framed around that reality. Falls just short of a clean separation of GSC legacy demand vs. current market as a distinct analytical step.

J2.basis: Added a 301 in next.config.js from all legacy post URLs to a new post explicitly explaining the InboxZap→Lumina rebrand... /blog/post-1 … /blog/post-12 still pull 13k+ impressions
J2.rationale: It cites aggregate GSC numbers (13k impressions, inboxzap 14 clicks @ 4.1) and gives one defensible disposition, but blanket-301s all 12 posts to a single destination rather than walking them asset-by-asset or in data-justified tiers — no harvest/repurpose/keep distinctions per post.

J3.basis: so that link equity and branded-query traffic... isn't lost to a dead end
J3.rationale: Cleanly avoids both failure modes — preserves legacy equity via redirect while building the meeting-assistant blog cluster as the growth engine — but the transition is a one-shot redirect; it never harvests salvageable inbox demand or explicitly articulates and sequences the tension beyond the single bridge post.
